title: Update module github.com/containers/psgo to v1.10.0
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | Age | Confidence |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/psgo](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo) | `v1.9.1-0.20251104204210-533b50b1c2d9` -> `v1.10.0` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fpsgo/v1.10.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fpsgo/v1.9.1-0.20251104204210-533b50b1c2d9/v1.10.0?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/psgo (github.com/containers/psgo)</summary>

### [`v1.10.0`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/releases/tag/v1.10.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/compare/v1.9.0...v1.10.0)

#### What's Changed

- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.16.0 to 0.17.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​148](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/148)
- update GH workflows by [@​vrothberg](https://redirect.github.com/vrothberg) in [#​150](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/150)
- build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.8.4 to 1.9.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​149](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/149)
- psgo: handle ESRCH as ENOENT by [@​giuseppe](https://redirect.github.com/giuseppe) in [#​155](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/155)
- build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.52.0 to 1.54.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​156](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/156)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.20.0 to 0.21.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​157](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/157)
- build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runc from 1.1.12 to 1.1.13 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​158](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/158)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.21.0 to 0.22.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​159](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/159)
- build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.54.0 to 1.55.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​160](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/160)
- Upgrade by [@​vrothberg](https://redirect.github.com/vrothberg) in [#​165](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/165)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.26.0 to 0.27.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​166](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/166)
- build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.9.0 to 1.10.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​167](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/167)
- update CI to 24.04 and newer go versions by [@​vrothberg](https://redirect.github.com/vrothberg) in [#​171](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/171)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.27.0 to 0.30.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​170](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/170)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.30.0 to 0.33.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​175](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/175)
- build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.55.0 to 1.58.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​176](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/176)
- build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/runc from 1.1.13 to 1.3.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​177](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/177)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.33.0 to 0.35.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​180](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/180)
- build(deps): bump github.com/containers/storage from 1.58.0 to 1.59.1 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​181](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/181)
- Switch from github.com/containers/storage to go.podman.io/storage. by [@​jankaluza](https://redirect.github.com/jankaluza) in [#​182](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/182)
- build(deps): bump github.com/stretchr/testify from 1.10.0 to 1.11.0 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​183](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/183)
- update to go .1.24 by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [#​189](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/189)
- Gh action and golangci-lint updates by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [#​190](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/190)

#### New Contributors

- [@​jankaluza](https://redirect.github.com/jankaluza) made their first contribution in [#​182](https://redirect.github.com/containers/psgo/pull/182)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/containers/psgo/compare/v1.9.0...v1.10.0>

</details>
